database.cantConnect: Could not connect to the database.
database.helpNeon: In your Dashboard, go to Dashboard > Connection Details. Select Postgres and check the box to show the password. Copy the provided URL.
database.helpSupabase: Go to Project Settings > Database. Scroll down to Connection string. Select the URI tab. Copy the link (usually uses port 6543 for Transaction Pooler) and replace [YOUR-PASSWORD] with your password.
database.helpSupabaseStep2: Scroll down to the Connection string section
database.helpSupabaseStep4: Copy the link (it usually uses port 6543 for the Transaction Pooler) and replace [YOUR-PASSWORD] with your password.
database.helpTitle: How to get my connection URL?
database.networkError: Network error. Check if the server is running.
database.preserveDataMsg: The database will be connected preserving existing data.
database.subtitle: Connect to an existing PostgreSQL database or use local Docker.
database.title: Database

google.desc: Allows login with Google and syncing financial events to calendar.
google.title: Google Calendar & OAuth

summary.finishNote: When you finish, the system will apply the database migrations, save your settings and restart the server automatically.

welcome.info: This wizard will guide you through the initial configuration in a few minutes. You will configure the database, create your account, and customize your chart of accounts.
welcome.subtitle: Financial Accelerator — Total control over your personal finances with privacy and freedom.
welcome.title: Welcome to

wizard.restartingDesc: The server is applying settings and restarting. You will be redirected to login automatically.

themeCustomizer.advancedCustomizationDesc: For advanced editing with visual preview and hundreds of ready-made presets, open the Tweakcn editor.

importModal.description: Paste your theme's CSS below. Include the :root (light mode) and .dark (dark mode) sections with variables like --primary, --background and others. The system will automatically switch between light and dark.
importModal.title: Import Custom CSS

themeCustomizer.panelDescription: Centralize here the global preferences that affect the entire project.
themeCustomizer.sheetDescription: Customize the project's theme and layout.

sidebarCollapseDesc.icon: Icons: the sidebar collapses to compact mode.
sidebarCollapseDesc.none: Fixed: the sidebar always stays visible.
sidebarCollapseDesc.offcanvas: Off-canvas: the sidebar slides fully off the screen.

sidebarPositionDesc.left: Left: main navigation to the left of the content.
sidebarPositionDesc.right: Right: main navigation to the right of the content.

sidebarVariantDesc.floating: Floating: sidebar detached with a border and visual breathing room.
sidebarVariantDesc.inset: Inset: sidebar embedded with rounded corners.
sidebarVariantDesc.sidebar: Default: traditional structure with a fixed sidebar.
